sentences.arabic: عَقَدَ رَئِيسُ الدَّوْلَةِ اجْتِمَاعًا مَعَ وَفْدٍ دُبْلُومَاسِيٍّ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Predsjednik države održao je sastanak s velikom diplomatskom delegacijom.
sentences.translationEn: The president of the country held a meeting with a large diplomatic delegation.

sentences.arabic: نَاقَشَ الطَّرَفَانِ تَعْزِيزَ التَّعَاوُنِ الثَّقَافِيِّ وَالتِّجَارِيِّ بَيْنَ الْبَلَدَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Dvije strane razgovarale su o jačanju kulturne i trgovinske saradnje između dvije zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: The two sides discussed strengthening cultural and commercial cooperation between the two countries.

sentences.arabic: أَعْرَبَ السَّفِيرُ عَنْ سَعَادَتِهِ بِتَطَوُّرِ الْعَلَاقَاتِ الثُّنَائِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ambasador je izrazio zadovoljstvo razvojem bilateralnih odnosa.
sentences.translationEn: The ambassador expressed his happiness with the development of bilateral relations.

sentences.arabic: سَيَتِمُّ تَوْقِيعُ اتِّفَاقِيَّةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ فِي نِهَايَةِ هَذَا الْأُسْبُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Nova saradnja bit će potpisana krajem ove sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: A new agreement will be signed at the end of this week.

sentences.arabic: يَهْدِفُ هَذَا اللِّقَاءُ إِلَى نَشْرِ السَّلَامِ وَالِاسْتِقْرَارِ فِي الْمِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj susret ima za cilj širenje mira i stabilnosti u regionu.
sentences.translationEn: This meeting aims to spread peace and stability in the region.
